name: The Williams Companies, Inc.
description: The Williams Companies, Inc. is a premier energy infrastructure company based in the United States. It specializes in the gathering, processing, and transportation of natural gas, operating a vast network of over 33,000 miles of pipeline. Williams plays a critical role in the energy supply chain, moving approximately one-third of the natural gas consumed in the U.S. The company is committed to delivering reliable, affordable, and clean energy solutions while investing in innovative technologies, such as carbon capture and emissions monitoring, to support a sustainable energy future for families and businesses nationwide.
